programme.title: The Land of Spirits - EP 4

In the first Year of the Tiger of the 21st century, a female tiger named October appeared - proof the species could thrive again.

programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 82
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: PLAYBOY OMDO, FINDING THE LOVE
programme.desc: Tomi, who acted arbitrarily as Dara's boss, got what he deserved. Dara asked her friend, Hilda, to subdue Tomi so that he would not act arbitrarily towards her. Will Tomi succumb to Dara's plan?

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 134
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: ROMEO, JULIET & SI NENEK

programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mahasiswa Abadi Kuliah Jurusan Cinta
programme.desc: Reno (Alzi Markers) and Dafa (Dimas Putra) are upset by the presence of Wina (Nabila Zavira), a new lecturer at their college. Wina is assigned to change Reno and Dafa's behavior so that they can achieve good grades.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 588
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Lu Bijak Sama Gua Sekarang Neng Basreng
programme.desc: The tight schedule of being a famous artist made Tama exhausted while driving so Tama crashed into a basreng vendor. With her kindness even though she was upset Aina (Shanice Margaretha) took Tama (Lavicky Nicholas) to the hospital. After realizing, Tama was surprised why he was in the hospital with an unknown woman. Tama asked Aina not to publicize this case. Suddenly reporters came and asked who Aina was, Tama spontaneously claimed that Aina was his girlfriend.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 83
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MENJARING CINTA DI TAMBAK NILA
programme.desc: Since becoming poor, Nila (Yuniza Icha) lives with her grandfather and manages his fish farm. programme.title: MISS KUDA PEMACU CINTA
programme.desc: Asih always knew how to handle the horses at Burhan's ranch, Sandra's father. Bimo came to Burhan's ranch to undergo a series of tests, one of which was riding and caring for horses. As soon as he got on the horse, Bimo fell off. Fortunately, Asih was there to help. Asih was annoyed with Bimo because his car horn nearly caused one of the horses to become agitated. Since Burhan noticed that Bimo and Asih knew each other, he asked Asih to train Bimo in horseback riding.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 136

programme.title: Cinta Itu Harus Berjalan kalau Capek Duduk aja
programme.desc: Bara (Masaji Wijayanto) is a famous soccer player, he does not want to continue his grandmother's business of managing an inn. Yuna is a goat-herding village girl who is quick-tempered. When they meet because when Bara kicks the ball that causes Yuna's goats to run away.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 590

programme.title: Tikus dan Kucing - EP 6
programme.desc: Menceritakan kisah cinta Mitha dan Jaenal yang tidak mendapat restu ibu bapa masing-masing, kerana ibu bapa mereka sering bertengkar, dan saling membenci.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: JOZAN - EP 18
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 6
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Kiah The Spy - EP 9
programme.desc: Kiah membina kumpulan baru untuk menguruskan perniagaan Ikan Pekasamnya,dia juga dilatih dan dilantik menjadi seorang ejen rahsia.

programme.title: NoYa - EP 5
programme.desc: Noya berhasrat untuk membawa semua kegilaan dan gelak ketawa yang telah diukir oleh Aya dan Noreen ke peringkat seterusnya.

programme.title: Bujang 40 - EP 10
programme.desc: Bujang, 40 tahun, sepanjang hidupnya sudah beberapa kali dia gagal bercinta. Kegagalan ini antara lain disebabkan sikap ibunya yang terlalu mengongkong hidupnya. Ini membuatkan Bujang mengambil keputusan untuk terus membujang.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2023 - EP 2
programme.desc: Berhibur bersama geng Sepahtu.

programme.title: Pulau Ke Pulau - EP 11
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Tabung Gelak Warna - EP 3

programme.title: Muka Buku - EP 7

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2025 - EP 4
programme.desc: Program menarik bersama Sepahtu untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Sorok - Sorok - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk semua.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 10
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Sketso S2 - EP 3

programme.title: Konnichiwa Superlawak - EP 2
programme.desc: Saksikan Jep, Rahim, Pak Ya, Tomok, dan rakan-rakan bola sepak Superlawak FC menjelajah ke Jepun demi menyahut cabaran perlawanan persahabatan menentang pasukan tempatan di bumi Jepun!

programme.title: Maharaja Lawak Mega 2019 - EP 6
programme.desc: Maharaja Lawak Mega kembali dengan penyertaan para pelawak terbaik di rantau ini merangkumi tiga negara Malaysia, Singapura dan Indonesia.

programme.title: Bas Ria - EP 3
programme.desc: Bas Ria bakal menyaksikan pasukan Bas Ria "memburu" selebriti-selebriti di dalam "hit list" mereka? Untuk apa? Untuk mendapatkan sesuatu yang berharga dari mereka.

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 11
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: Karoot Komedia X S3 - EP 12

programme.title: Sorry, Sengaja! - EP 11
programme.desc: Rancangan "prank" yang berlaku di pejabat Astro, melibatkan pekerja-pekerja yang selalunya tidak menjangka akan sesuatu berlaku. Rancangan ini dikepalai oleh beberapa "prankster" dari Thinker Studios.

programme.title: Travel Lawak - EP 11

programme.title: Stand Up Comedy Otai - EP 7
programme.desc: Masihkah anda ingat akan Pi Mai Pi Mai Tang Tu, Senario, Salih Yaacob, dan ramai lagi lagenda komedi tanah air? Kini mereka kembali di atas satu pentas bagi mengubat kerinduan terhadap mereka.

programme.title: Arena Panas : Pro VS Bro S1 - EP 5

programme.title: No Entry
programme.desc: A loyal friend helps a victim escape a cruel marriage by introducing her to a dancer, setting off a chain of comic misunderstandings, emotional twists, and surprising revelations. Release Year: 2005 Director: Anees Bazmee Awards: 2006 Nominee Filmfare Award Best Film

programme.title: Ghayal
programme.desc: Framed for his brother's murder by Balwant Rai, Ajay survives prison with three allies, planning a daring revenge that will expose the truth and bring down the powerful villain. Release Year: 1990 Director: Rajkumar Santoshi Awards: Best Film: Dharamendra, Best Actor: Sunny Deol, Best Director: Rajkumar Santoshi, Best Story Writer: Rajkumar Santoshi, Best Editor Filmfare Awards

programme.title: Buddha In Traffic Jam
programme.desc: Carefree student Vikram's viral social campaign exposes harsh realities, but he soon gets trapped in a dangerous conspiracy of lies and deceit that threatens his life.

programme.title: Angaaray
programme.desc: After Sanjay dies trying to punish Jolly for Aarti's assault, she rises to seek justice herself, driven by grief, courage, and the need to avenge her brother. Release Year: 1986 Director: Rajesh Seth, Rajesh Sethi

programme.title: Khiladi 420
programme.desc: Ritu marries Dev Kumar, but after her father's death, her growing suspicion reveals Dev's hidden darkness, turning love into fear as disturbing truths surface. Release Year: 2000 Director: Neeraj Vora Awards: 3 nominations

programme.title: F.A.L.T.U.
programme.desc: Four struggling friends fake a university to escape failure, but their risky lie grows out of control, forcing them to rely on friendship and quick thinking to survive the chaos.

programme.title: Aparichit - The Stranger
programme.desc: Timid Ambi who suffers from multiple personality disorder becomes Aparichit who does not think twice about killing wrong-doers.

programme.title: Gaami
programme.desc: Shankar isolates himself to cure a rare condition, but his journey forces him to confront buried fears and emotional wounds that hold the true key to his survival.

programme.title: Diya
programme.desc: Forced into abortion, Thulasi's pain turns supernatural when the vengeful spirit of her unborn child returns years later, punishing those who destroyed her innocent future.

programme.title: Rascals
programme.desc: Expert conmen Chetan and Bhagat fall for Khushi, but when an old victim Anthony kidnaps her, they must outwit danger and prove their love before it's too late. Release Year: 2011 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: F.A.L.T.U.
programme.desc: Four struggling friends fake a university to escape failure, but their risky lie grows out of control, forcing them to rely on friendship and quick thinking to survive the chaos.

programme.desc: Timid Ambi who suffers from multiple personality disorder becomes Aparichit who does not think twice about killing wrong-doers.

programme.title: Gaami
programme.desc: Shankar isolates himself to cure a rare condition, but his journey forces him to confront buried fears and emotional wounds that hold the true key to his survival.

programme.title: Phata Poster Nikla Hero
programme.desc: Vishwas dreams of stardom but is mistaken for an inspector by Kajal, and when her strict mother arrives, his double life explodes into hilarious confusion. Release Year: 2013 Director: Rajkumar Santoshi Awards: 5 nominations

programme.title: Taal
programme.desc: Humiliated by her ex's family, Mansi rebuilds her life with Vikrant's help, but when her former lover returns seeking forgiveness, old pain threatens her new success. Release Year: 1999 Director: Subhash Ghai

programme.title: Attack - Part 1
programme.desc: A terrorist attack renders Arjun paralysed and distraught with the thoughts of his dead lover. So, when the attacker returns, Arjun participates in an experiment to seek revenge.

programme.title: Khiladi 420
programme.desc: Ritu marries Dev Kumar, but after her father's death, her growing suspicion reveals Dev's hidden darkness, turning love into fear as disturbing truths surface. Release Year: 2000 Director: Neeraj Vora Awards: 3 nominations

programme.title: Ramji Londonwale
programme.desc: This is the story about Ramji, who is a skilled cook and flies to London to try his luck in work. It is the story about his journey and life in London.

programme.title: Ek Villain Returns
programme.desc: When a singer disappears during a serial killer spree, a taxidriver and a businessman's son cross paths in a disturbing tale where the lines between good and evil are blurred.

programme.title: Majhdhaar
programme.desc: Krishna loves Radha but they cannot marry against their parent's wishes. Although she is pregnant with Krishna's child, circumstances lead Radha to marry Gopal.

programme.title: Anari
programme.desc: A rich girl appoints a simpleton, as her bodyguard. She soon falls in love with him, which creates havoc in his life.

programme.title: Dashing Hero
programme.desc: A revenue inspector falls in love with a girl but faces problems due to his cowardliness. He is compelled to find a way to prove himself to her father, who wants her to marry a brave man.

programme.title: Ab Tak Chhappan 2
programme.desc: Sadhu Agashe, a retired encounter specialist, faces a series of challenges after he returns to Mumbai to solve various criminal cases growing in the city.

programme.title: Paagalpanti
programme.desc: A tourist group from India sets out on a vacation to only have their trip to turn into a patriotic mission. Will it end well for them?

programme.title: Bewakoofiyaan
programme.desc: Mohit a marketing whiz kid and Mayera, the financial brain with a penchant for shoes, are a couple in love but lacking money. Can you survive on just love and fresh air?

programme.title: Saala Khadoos
programme.desc: The story of a former boxer who quits boxing following a fallout with the authorities but goes on to coach a fisherwoman to fulfill his dream through her. Starring Madhavan.

programme.title: Toolsidas Junior
programme.desc: Watching his father lose the 1994 Club Snooker Championship, 13-year-old Midi takes on the impossible journey to bring his father's name on the Winner's Board.

programme.title: Costao
programme.desc: In the 1990s, customs officer Costao Fernandes becomes a legend in Goa due to his bravery and tactics. His personal and professional life unravels when he kills a powerful drug lord in self-defence.

programme.title: Srikanth
programme.desc: In a world where the odds are against him, Srikanth defies the norms and makes his way from rural India to becoming the first visually impaired student at MIT.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: Two young lovers (Vijayata Pandit, Kumar Gaurav) run away to elope after their parents decide to oppose their relationship.

programme.title: Netaji Subhash Chandra Bose
programme.desc: After resigning from the presidential post of the Indian National Congress, Subhas plays an important role in India's freedom struggle during World War II.

programme.title: Malang
programme.desc: Advait visits Goa where he meets Sara, a free-spirited girl who lives life unshackled. Opposites attract and all goes well until life turns upside down

programme.title: Extraa Shots - Befikre
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Haseen Dillruba
programme.desc: Under investigation as a suspect in her husband's murder, a wife reveals details of their thorny marriage that seem to only further blur the truth.

programme.title: Prassthanam
programme.desc: A rural politician marries a widow with kids and gains a respectable position. He trusts his stepson more than his own in political matters; thus upsetting his son beyond limits.

programme.title: Savi
programme.desc: Savi a simple housewife attempts a daring jailbreak to get her husband out of one of high security prisons With 400 inmates, 75 armed guards, 60 surveillance cameras.

programme.title: Luv Ki Arrange Marriage
programme.desc: Luv is in love with Ishika and wants to ask for her hand in marriage. A laughter riot follows when his widowed father falls in love with Ishika's mother. Which couple has a more successful love story?

programme.title: Bhool Chuk Maaf
programme.desc: Ranjan, a small-town romantic from Banaras, gets a government job to marry Titli, but forgets his vow to Lord Shiva. Trapped by fate, he must fulfil his promise in a funny journey of love.

programme.title: Pk
programme.desc: An innocent alien lands on Earth but loses his communication device. He meets Jaggu, a heartbroken reporter, and tries to find his device. With time, he raises many thought-provoking questions.

programme.desc: Pregnant Jothi is found unconscious with her belly cut and unborn baby abducted. As police investigate, shocking twists and mounting complications hinder the case.

programme.title: Poongodi

programme.title: Punitha
programme.desc: Maragatham holds her step-daughter Punitha dear, to the point of being overbearing. However, their bond turns twisted & burdened when Punitha finds her soulmate, Kabilan. Amidst family betrayals, can Punitha show her mother the true meaning of love?

programme.title: MANAMAGALE VAA
programme.desc: Narmada's mission to her ancestral village to reunite her father & his estranged family entwines with Kathir's task of finding suitable grooms for his three sisters. What unfolds when they fall in love, striving for a cause against the same enemy?

programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Selvi longs for the loving embrace & heart-warming bond of a joint family. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds & win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: LAKSHMI
programme.desc: Maha, her family’s financial backbone, marries Selvam, on condition that she will continue to support her family financially even after marriage. Post which they confront challenges that put the family’s peace and happiness to test.

programme.title: IRU MALARGAL
programme.desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends-Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi-tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

programme.title: AADUKALAM
programme.desc: Sathya loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Selvanayagi, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sathya face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Movie-DHARMAPURI

programme.title: Annam

programme.title: Marumagal
programme.desc: Aathirai's unyielding passion for helping others constantly lands her in trouble, while Prabhu's self-serving actions show disregard for his own family's well-being. Follow their tumultuous journeys as fate brings them together in marriage.

programme.title: Lavender Fields
programme.desc: The life of a simple flower farm girl is shattered when she falls for a charming accountant, who turns out to be a married gun cartel member. Targeted for his stolen money, she loses everything she holds dear and reinvents herself to seek justice.

programme.title: The Alibi
programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The lives of four individuals are turned upside down after they witness the murder of their friend. They band together to put the alleged killer behind bars, but years later, the imprisoned man seeks revenge, unraveling dark secrets that test their loyalty and survival.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.title: Ngayon at Kailanman
programme.desc: Eva fights to reclaim her place in the wealthy Cortes family while searching for the truth about her identity. Fate brings her together with Inno, and their love story endures family secrets, rivalry and tragedy as they discover the real meaning of forgiveness and redemption.

programme.desc: Being a prominent political clan, the Sagrados want nothing but to keep their name faultless and sacred, until a controversial incident comes their way.

programme.title: TFC Kids Zone
programme.desc: A programme block filled with animated short stories, nursery rhymes and songs, as well as Filipino language lessons, TFC Kids' Zone promises a rich treasure trove of learning and discovery that parents and their young ones will find enriching and empowering.

programme.title: TV Patrol Express Live
programme.desc: Comprehensive and incisive, TV Patrol is the benchmark in Philippines news journalism, bringing you the most relevant news delivered by the country's best news anchors.

programme.title: BRGY

programme.title: TV Patrol Live

programme.title: The Alibi
programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The lives of four individuals are turned upside down after they witness the murder of their friend. They band together to put the alleged killer behind bars, but years later, the imprisoned man seeks revenge, unraveling dark secrets that test their loyalty and survival.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.title: It's Showtime
programme.desc: Hosted by an all-star cast, It's Showtime is a variety show unlike any other. Watch as people from all over come on stage to showcase their skills and creativity in this one-of-a-kind talent show full of fun and prizes.

Amongst the bones brought to the surface is a much fresher body, that of Vincent, the captain everyone thought had gone down with the ship. programme.title: Parler Mal
programme.desc: Could it be that two Acadian actors in the successful series ''a la valdrague'' suffer from linguistic insecurity? Bianca Richard and Gabriel Robichaud, from New Brunswick, set themselves the challenge of deciphering this curse and examine the state of expression of the French-Canadian language and particularly Acadian.

programme.title: Le Mot Je T'aime N'existe Pas
programme.desc: In the shadow of the Republic and the tumult of different dialects, Nadesh, Cherif and Anamiga are amongst the countless interpreters working daily to recount stories of exile and precarity. Their voices weave an invisible thread between here and elsewhere, the world of the living and the darkness of migration.

programme.title: Echappees Belles
programme.desc: Sophie Jovillard, Jerome Pitorin, Ismael Khelifa and Tiga embark the traveller that lies within each of us for a fabulous breath of fresh air! Ninety minutes filled with new horizons and fascinating encounters around the world, four different ways of seeing a city, a region, a country...

programme.title: Enquetes De Region - EP 20
programme.desc: Today, for every three farmers who leave, one young person sets up. With their utopias and methods, more radical activists, these newcomers are shaking up a sector already in full reflection. The rural coordination is now an essential interlocutor in Normandy.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Banel Et Adama
programme.desc: In a remote village in northern Senegal. Banel and Adama love each other deeply, passionately, carried by their dreams. But can the absolute love that binds them truly withstand the weight of traditions? A bold and poetic contemporary tragedy.

programme.title: Nous Les Griots
programme.desc: Malik, Daouda's eldest son, wants to marry Mariama. But when a meeting between the two families, both originally from Senegal, is organised over a meal, Daouda discovers that they are from two very different social classes. His family is ''griot''; Mariama's is noble.

programme.title: Mboa, Matanda, Le Tournoi Des Rois
programme.desc: Within the city of Mboa Matanda, the Crab and Cayman districts have been doing battle for centuries. Tasked with restoring peace, General Dibombe organises a wrestling tournament between the champions of the different districts. But then he finds himself facing General Essoka, the man who had murdered his family.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 1
programme.desc: Marianne, Leon's mother has died. Now he has to move to Montreal to live with Francis, his biological father. Fortunately his grandfather Bernard will be at his side during this painful ordeal.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 2
programme.desc: Leon visits his new secondary school to finalise his admission with the headmaster. Meanwhile Francis realises that he'll have to make some changes in the house to make life easier for Leon.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 3
programme.desc: It's Leon's first day at school! His French teacher is convinced he'll be an asset for the class. Leon meets Florence, a pupil suffering from cystic fibrosis.

programme.title: Global Us
programme.desc: Scientists warn that a key Atlantic current system that brings warm water to Europe is weakening. Also: rising puma numbers cause conflict in Patagonia, and Bulgaria’s legendary teacher fosters world class physicists.

programme.title: Movie - Pulikuthi Pandi
programme.desc: A young man named Pulikkuthi Pandi fights injustice while trying to pursue a beautiful woman. However, problems arise when he locks horns with a powerful individual.

programme.title: Movie - Bala
programme.desc: Bala, a hitman in Pasupathi's gang, is madly in love with Aarthi, the daughter of a rival gangster. Bala faces several problems when both the gangs plan to end their rivalry.

programme.title: Movie - Thamizhachi
programme.desc: After her husband is unjustly imprisoned on false charges, a woman refuses to step out of her house. With the arrival of a female reporter looking for real stories, the truth eventually comes out.

programme.title: Movie - Bramachari
programme.desc: Ganesan and Malathi fall in love despite being from different economic backgrounds. However, Malathi's father Thiruvadi stands as an obstacle to their marriage.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Hello
programme.desc: Chandru's friends make fun of him as he does not have a girlfriend. He points out a girl claiming that she is his girlfriend, after which various unfortunate events take place in her life.

programme.title: Movie - Azhagesan
programme.desc: Azhagesan, a mentally-challenged man, secretly loves Nandini. However when Sekhar, an evil man, rapes Nandini, Azhagesan sets out to take revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Sabash
programme.desc: Cheenu, a blind man, and his friend Dharan discover the body of Cheenu's wife Shanti. Initially, the police regard it as a suicide. However, evidence soon surfaces suggesting foul play.

programme.title: Movie - Salangai Oli
programme.desc: Balakrishna, a trained Kuchipudi dancer, gets an opportunity to compete in a classical dance festival. However, two days prior to his performance, his mother passes away, leaving him devastated.

programme.title: Movie - Kadhal Sugamanathu
programme.desc: A woman loves a man but does not have the courage to confess her feelings. Instead, she asks her younger sister to approach her love interest. However her sister betrays her by proposing to him herself.

programme.title: Movie - Sakthi Vel
programme.desc: Sakthivel, an honest police officer, beats up the son of a politician. Following this, he is promoted and transferred to a village, but his promotion only lands him in trouble.

programme.title: Movie - Sathyam Sivam Sundaram
programme.desc: Sathyam Sivam Sundaram is a Tamil feature film starring Baby Shamili, Nizhalgal Ravi and Radha.

programme.title: Movie - Chinna Chinna Aasaigal
programme.desc: Vasu is tired of following his strict father's rules and dreams of being as carefree as his friends. When his father leaves on a business trip, he finally has the chance to be independent.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Thadam
programme.desc: During the investigation of a man's murder, the police find their prime suspect. However, the case gets complicated when the police also learn that their suspect has a lookalike.

programme.title: Movie - Naai Sekar
programme.desc: Sekar's scientist neighbour is hell-bent on proving that it is possible to alter the DNA of animals and humans. When Sekar is bitten by a dog being experimented on, their traits get swapped.

programme.title: Movie - Kidari
programme.desc: Kombaiah Pandiayan, a big shot in his village, is stabbed by one of his enemies. Following this, his loyal servant Kidaari sets out to find the culprit.

programme.title: Movie - Manam Kothi Paravaigal
programme.desc: The son of a construction business owner falls in love with his neighbour's daughter. His life lands in danger when he learns that her father is a criminal.

programme.title: Movie - Unakkum Enakkum
programme.desc: A young man leaves his luxurious life to prove to his lover's brother that he is not a spoilt rich brat. He works hard and lives like a farmer till the next harvest, and wins everyone's heart.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 15
programme.desc: Edwin van der Sar has faced down pressure on the biggest stages in world football, but his toughest battle came after retirement. In 2023, the legendary goalkeeper suffered a life-threatening brain haemorrhage. In this episode Edwin opens up on his recovery and looks back on his career at the top that redefined goalkeeping.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 31
programme.desc: This week, The Big Interview sits down with Newcastle United's Malick Thiaw to discuss his journey to the Premier League. Growing up in Dusseldorf within a multicultural family, the German International reflects on his early life and the role models that shaped him. Rising through the academy systems of various Bundesliga clubs, Thiaw made his mark at Schalke 04 before donning the famous Rossoneri shirt of AC Milan where he won the Supercoppa Italiana in 2025.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 41
programme.desc: We shine a spotlight on Unai Emery, tracing the journey of one of Europe's most meticulous and innovative coaches from his roots in Spain to the pinnacle of the Premier League. Through exclusive interviews with his brother and the coaches who guided him in his early years, we uncover the dedication, detail and relentless drive that shaped his rise in the game.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 42
programme.desc: Ahead of the Tyne-Wear Derby, we catch up with former Newcastle striker Demba Ba at USL Dunkerque, where he is 'Head of Football Operations'. From unforgettable moments on the pitch to shaping his approach off it, Ba shares insights into the experiences that continue to influence his vision for the game today.

programme.title: THE ART OF... - EP 2
programme.desc: Expect high-level insight and revealing anecdotes as some of the finest players in PL history explain the techniques and temperaments that took them to the top.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Themba Gorimbo vs. Luke Michael
programme.desc: This episode features Themba 'The Answer' Gorimbo and Luke 'Young Gun' Michael battling for the vacant welterweight championship. Vicious ground and pound ends this fight before the end of Round 1. Bonus coverage includes Sizwe Mnikathi vs. August Kayambala.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Andre Berto vs. Miguel Rodriguez
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated Andre Berto (21-0, 18 KOs) battling Miguel Angel Rodriguez, aka 'Miki', (29-2, 23 KOs)i for the vacant WBC Welterweight Title from the FedEx Forum in Memphis, Tennessee, USA on June 21, 2008. Bonus coverage includes Chris 'The Nightmare' Arreola (23-0, 21 KOs) vs. Chazz Witherspoon (23-0, 15 KOs).

programme.title: Greatest Classics Vinny Pazienza vs. Gilbert Dele
programme.desc: In this episode, we see 'The Pazmanian Devil' Vinny Pazienza in front of his hometown crowd in Providence, Rhode Island, taking on undefeated WBA Super Welterweight World Champion Gilbert Dele of France. The raucous crowd was firmly in favor of its local hero, cheering him on as he looked to win his second World Title, having lost the first one to Greg Haugen three years earlier.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Chris Arreola vs. Tomasz Adamek
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a heavyweight collision between Chris Arreola and Tomasz Adamek in a battle of one-loss competitors. Also on the card, Rocky Jearez takes on Jorge Barrios before a gruesome cut calls an end to the fight.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 2 featuring Abi, Tamawashi, Takarafuji and Mitakeumi from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Bernard Hopkins vs. Jean Pascal
programme.desc: This episode features Bernard Hopkins taking on Jean Pascal in a light heavyweight title bout, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 4 of 4.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Edwin Rodriguez vs. Jason Escalera
programme.desc: This episode features a USBA super middleweight title bout that sees Edwin Rodriguez defend against the undefeated Jason Escalera.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Lamont Peterson vs. Amir Khan
programme.desc: Lamont Peterson takes on Amir Khan in a bout with a controversial ending, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Amir Khan vs. Marcos Maidana
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Amir Khan defending the WBA light welterweight title against Marcos Maidana in a bout that earned 2010 Fight of the Year honors from the Boxing Writers Association of America. Also on the card, a young Adrien Broner showcases his skills.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 featuring Okinoumi, Kotoyuki, Kotoshogiku and Endo from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the first ever Judo Grand Prix from Cancun, stop to get to know number 2 ranked fighter in the world Tal Flicker, and show a demonstration on how to execute one of Flicker's favorite submissions.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features a look at rising star Ryan "Darth" Bader. We go over BMX bike jumps with heavyweight Roy "Big Country" Nelson. And MMA:30 takes you inside the training camp of stud wrestler Phil Davis and we take a look at Bellator's duel promotional event Dynamite.

programme.title: FS MMA Nick Thompson vs. Davion Peterson
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! BodogFight former welterweight champion Nick Thompson looks to send Davion Peterson into submission in Costa Rica.

programme.desc: This episode features a USBA super middleweight title bout that sees Edwin Rodriguez defend against the undefeated Jason Escalera.

This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 3 featuring Okinoumi, Kotoyuki, Kotoshogiku and Endo from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the first ever Judo Grand Prix from Cancun, stop to get to know number 2 ranked fighter in the world Tal Flicker, and show a demonstration on how to execute one of Flicker's favorite submissions.

programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode features a look at rising star Ryan "Darth" Bader. We go over BMX bike jumps with heavyweight Roy "Big Country" Nelson. And MMA:30 takes you inside the training camp of stud wrestler Phil Davis and we take a look at Bellator's duel promotional event Dynamite.

programme.title: FS MMA Nick Thompson vs. Davion Peterson
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! BodogFight former welterweight champion Nick Thompson looks to send Davion Peterson into submission in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Edwin Rodriguez vs. Jason Escalera
programme.desc: This episode features a USBA super middleweight title bout that sees Edwin Rodriguez defend against the undefeated Jason Escalera.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Lamont Peterson vs. Amir Khan
programme.desc: Lamont Peterson takes on Amir Khan in a bout with a controversial ending, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Amir Khan vs. Marcos Maidana
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Amir Khan defending the WBA light welterweight title against Marcos Maidana in a bout that earned 2010 Fight of the Year honors from the Boxing Writers Association of America. Also on the card, a young Adrien Broner showcases his skills.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Travis Walker vs. Chris Arreola

programme.desc: The team are at Horsetail Fall in the Yosemite Nation Park to watch the 300m high waterfall become Firefall. Can the team save snowy Princess Glorinda and Firefall at the Yosemite National park?

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret "Echo" Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the "keys" in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 31
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Leopard didn't have spots. All the animals had something special; Lion had his mane, Peacock his beautiful tail, Zebra his stripes… but Leopard was as plain as plain can be. Then one day Leopard made friends with Puff Adder with his bright colourful spots. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 32
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Hyena didn't have short back legs. He was always chasing around and nipping other animals on the bottom. Then one day the animals had enough. It was time to teach that naughty Hyena a lesson! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 39

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: The campers' splat-tastic game of paintball is rather rudely interrupted by a foul and formidable fiend known only as Camoflush.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: After an epic chase around the globe, the team finally catches Rafaela, making it Ms. Nowhere's 100th arrest - and the agency is throwing her a party! Meanwhile, Cisco's uncle Tuco, a famous luchador in Mexico, is visiting town promoting his next show. But the celebration comes to a halt when there's an explosion at the party and an attack by a mysterious group of criminals!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 26

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: Based on PD Eastman's classic children’s book, Go, Dog. Go! Follows 6-year-old dog, Tag Barker, on her hilarious adventures in the city of Pawston, a fun-loving community of dogs on the go. Tag is a skilled mechanic and loves anything that goes. With her ingenuity and creativity, Tag can go as far as any plan will take her, always with her best friend, Scooch Pooch, by her side. Scooch’s easy-going nature is the perfect counterbalance to Tag’s high-octane energy.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 26
programme.desc: When Tag and Scooch learn that Sandra Paws' sleigh broke down on a mountain, they have to go on an adventure to fix the sleigh and save Sniffs-mas! Meanwhile, Beans tries to get a grumpy Frank to feel the Sniffs-mas spirit.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: Marcus makes a Dew Drop-sized hot-air balloon for Phoebe and the Dews have a blast helping their kids from above, including secretly guiding Lola back to her family, before she accidentally follows Hip-Hop the frog out of the park. / Phoebe makes a pair of glasses for Bob the bird, but when seeing things clearly for the first time gets him lost, the Dews help Bob find his nest before his family arrives for a visit.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 26
programme.desc: The Dews think a double rainbow is making their powers change, but what they discover is that they are about to graduate to a new level of Dew Dropness, with the newfound ability to float in the air! / When Reed discovers he’s being assigned a family, he runs to tell Athena, only to find Athena and her house are missing! While Eden and Phoebe search for Athena, Reed’s on Dew Drop duty for Athena. After successfully helping Athena's kids, Reed is assigned the family in the apartment below Athena.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: When the crew takes on a mission to help Ian get some rest for a Badminton Tournament, Jax realises that the biggest approach isn't always the best approach. / When Lula loses her comic book, Ari learns that the best heroes rely on teamwork and not gadgets.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When a pesky gopher gets in the way of Fawna making her famous veggie stew, Niah learns to not let a bad experience, get in the way of doing good. / When the inexperienced Rona has to step in for Donna, the team makes sure everyone has the best camping trip ever.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a recipe for dandelion soup and a soup bowl, she discovers Kitty Fairy is sick! Gabby and Pandy make her some delicious dandelion soup and while she rests, they take care of her Garden. With the help of all the Gabby Cats, they water the Singing Flowers, help the Rainbow Kitty Bushes regain their color, and sing some fussy Itty Bitty Blossoms a lullaby. For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Kitty Fairy sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a spaceship that takes off with a sleeping CatRat inside! Gabby, Pandy, and Kitty Fairy have to get the ship back into The Fairy Tail Garden before Floyd (who thinks it's the best kitty toy ever!) gets his paws on it!

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 51

Valley, Grug throws a giant party to force them to become best friends

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 52
programme.desc: With a big meteorite headed straight for Ahhh! Valley, Grug gathers a team to try and stop the rock before it destroys the valley while Ugga takes the rest of the family to go do the one thing they've always wanted to do in Ahhh! Valley before they evacuate

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 59
programme.desc: Missing his old life on his birthday, Boss tries to have a full-fledged grown-up celebration in Chicago, but Carol is the only one able to chauffeur and take care of him. The two battle at every stop of the birthday party tour, but when Boss's old work nemesis sets him up for an Federal Investigation Sting at an improv comedy show, Boss and Carol are forced to work together to escape the law.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 60
programme.desc: Boss, Tina, JJ, Dez and Pip willfully get babysat by the Uncuddleables, planning to expose them as horrible sitters via secret, hidden cameras. But the plan is thrown for a loop when Tina's first night alone without her parents makes her fall for their sitter Mia as a "substitute mommy." Meanwhile, Nannycam uses the babysitting distraction to sneak into the Uncuddleables' secret garage hideout to gather intel with her own "B field team."

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: When they learn the Dragon Hunters are tracking the Flightmare, Hiccup and Astrid race to stop them after Heather spills secrets from Viggo Grimborn

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 26
programme.desc: After Heather and the Flightmare have been captured by Viggo and the Dragon Hunters, Hiccup must develop a plan to outwit this dangerous new enemy

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 25
programme.desc: In part one of a two-part season finale, the Melvins create a final exam that George and Harold will be sure to fail: the Doom Dome. To ensure success, Melvinborg injects Melvin's cells with nanobots, giving him heightened powers. But when George and Harold find out, they crank the nanobots to the max, causing Melvin to grow into a giant! The boys enlist Captain Underpants to fight the jealous nerd, but their victory only loses the nanobots onto Piqua...

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 26
programme.desc: Part two of the season finale finds George, Harold, Captain Underpants, and the Melvins trapped in the Doom Dome with rampaging nanobots. When the humans try to neautralize the bots, they find a new host: Captain Underpants. Now they must shrink down to go into Captain Underpants’ brain and defeat the nanobots’ leader, Nanozero. But they need help: Captain Underpants’ brain cells to the rescue! And when it’s all over, George and Harold will finally be able to go to summer camp.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 11

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 12

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: When Omen hijacks the Mothership and Royal Cores, all seems lost for our heroes. The Royal heirs are able to defeat the killer Blank, but at a high cost.

But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 6

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. She can jump really high! Then Flea can jump everywhere and see everything.! Tales from Africa.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4) - EP 20
programme.desc: For centuries, this 500,000-square-mile area of the Atlantic has been the most notorious stretch of ocean on Earth. It's a place where ships, planes, and unsuspecting travellers have been lost.

programme.title: China's Extreme Skywalker
programme.desc: Dubbed the Prince of Tightrope Walking and holder of six world records, an ethnic Uighur man pushes the limits and performs without safety equipments.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S6) - EP 5
programme.desc: Early American malls have no food court until a cinnamon bun, a pretzel, and a panda all move in to create three of the world's most iconic food brands and transform the American mall.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S6) - EP 6
programme.desc: Stephen Whitman introduces Americans to chocolate candy in a sampler box, Russell Stover builds a competing company, and both brands help turn chocolate from an unknown import to a boxed American staple.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: When is Mission: Impossible more than just a movie? Newly uncensored evidence will reveal the lengths that the few and the elite have gone to within the hostile lands, all to complete the mission.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny (S1) - EP 8
programme.desc: They say better the devil you know, but what happens when you have to hold hands with him? When governments strike deals with cults, mobs, and even enemies, frosty relationships are tested head-on.

programme.title: I Survived A Crime (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: A brave grandma fights off two carjackers intent on stealing her truck; a woman stands up against heinous domestic violence; two assailants pull a gun on a store manager who escapes.

programme.title: City Confidential (S9) - EP 11
programme.desc: A deadly church bombing stuns a small Illinois county, sending law enforcement scrambling for answers. Then it happens again.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6) - EP 3
programme.desc: Lakhvir Singh enjoyed cooking for Lucky Cheema, the man she loved. But when he left her to marry a much younger woman, Singh made the couple a meal that would turn out to be the last Lucky ever tasted.

programme.desc: A criminal poses as a patient in the dental clinics of Manila and then robs and rapes their staff. Amidst an attack, he reveals he can speak the local dialect, leaving a clue for the police.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 5
programme.desc: An angry confrontation leads to a 31-year-old father facing life behind bars after shooting his ex-girlfriend's boyfriend in the leg. He insists he was defending his ex and their child from an intruder.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It? - EP 6
programme.desc: A 52-year-old VP of a medical center faces 95 years in prison for fatally stabbing a doctor's husband. He insists he was trapped by a man intent on harming him and forced to defend himself.

programme.title: Tell Me How I Died - EP 1
programme.desc: After a beloved pastor's second wife is killed in a tragic car crash, it raises suspicions over the death of his first wife. Her death never sat easy with distinguished pathologist Dr. Wayne Ross.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2) - EP 14
programme.desc: One man's laundry list of traffic violations haunts him while another struggles to find someone to bail him out before his anniversary ends. In Modesto, a man faces felony charges for a very unique charge.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S6) - EP 4
programme.desc: A young father and his family come under attack at a busy drive-thru. Terrified of his aggravated assailant, he fires his gun and allegedly injures an innocent bystander.

programme.title: First Blood (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: This articulate and boastful killer is remembered for terrifying the coastal town of Santa Cruz in the early 1970s, but his desire to kill started when he was a young child fantasising about murder.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2) - EP 19
programme.desc: After police respond to an apparent suicide, the case takes an unexpected turn when investigators cannot find a gun near the body.

programme.title: Murder In The 21st - EP 4
programme.desc: A horrific quadruple homicide goes unsolved for over a decade. While one investigation goes cold, another heats up as the search holds the key to unravelling the secrets of a serial killer.

programme.title: The Secret Life of Trees (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: Even the mightiest oak must start life as a tiny acorn. We explore the secret lives of young trees, discovering how they magically transform from minute seeds into mature adults. But with fewer than one in a thousand seeds reaching adulthood, a tree's early years are the most treacherous of its life.

programme.title: Extreme Treks (S2) - EP 1
programme.desc: With its pristine forests, alpine meadows and rugged mountains, Glacier National Park in Montana is a world like no other. Ryan Pyle dons his snow-boots and embarks on an epic trek across this snowy and isolated landscape with its formidable peaks.

programme.title: Where the Wild Men Are with Ben Fogle (S10) - EP 5
programme.desc: Ben journeys into Zambia to live with a British family who have built a safari lodge on the edge of a national park. In the process, Ben uncovers what motivates them to keep going in the face of challenges including fire and flooding.

programme.title: Robson Green Grand Slam Fishing (S1) - EP 9
programme.desc: Robson heads to Senegal to try for the Offshore Grand Slam, and finds that the country's coast provides some of the best fishing in the world.

programme.title: Gardening Australia S37 - EP 4

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw S5 - EP 82
programme.desc: Nothing beats eco eats! Astrid Jorgensen, founder of Pub and Couch Choir, and Paul Iskov, owner of roaming restaurant Fervor, join Adam to make sustainable and attainable recipes!

programme.title: Common Cause S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: As rising sea temperatures devastate coral reefs, a community in Papua New Guinea teams up with an Australian organisation - and the feisty village chicken - to restore fish stocks in their coastal waters.

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent (2026) - EP 3
programme.desc: A revolution is taking place in Indonesia. President Prabowo Subianto is nationalising and militarising his nation's economy to deliver a self-reliant future. But some warn Indonesia could be returning to the Suharto era.

programme.title: Planet America (2026) - EP 7
programme.desc: How and when will America's war with Iran end? We ask former US Navy Rear Admiral Mark Montgomery. Meanwhile on the home front, President Trump wants to save American democracy - by making it much harder to vote.

programme.title: Media Watch (2026) - EP 7
programme.desc: Journalists scramble to verify the tragic death of school children in Iran. Dubai influencers caught in Iran's crosshairs mysteriously change their tune. Do Victorian judges issue more suppression orders than any other state?

programme.title: National Press Club Address (2026) - EP 8
programme.desc: Ulrik Haagerup, founder and CEO of Constructive Institute, addresses the National Press Club of Australia on the topic "Is Journalism Part of the Problem for Democracy? And how do we become part of the solution?"

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien (2026) - EP 56
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw S5 - EP 83
programme.desc: Social media sensation Andy Hearnden and cookbook queen Lara Lee are in the kitchen with Adam to share their recipe winners for quickfire dinners.

programme.title: The Pacific (2026) - EP 1
programme.desc: The Pacific is back for 2026. This week: Tongan women speak up about harassment in kava clubs, families in Port Moresby face eviction, plus how Melbourne's Storm Waka program is changing young Pasifika lives. (Return)

programme.title: Pacific Break Live from Samoa 2025: S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Pacific Break returns in 2025 with a special concert in Samoa.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season (2026) - EP 13
programme.desc: ABC Australia brings you Australian Rules football live in your lounge room every week with coverage of the 2026 AFL Premiership Season.

programme.title: Ride
programme.desc: Two world champions fall in love and conquer the world of BMX racing. A single training accident risks taking everything they have known away.

programme.title: ABC Late News (2026) - EP 56
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Michael Tetlow.

programme.title: The Business (2026) - EP 28
programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, investors, employees and businesses big and small. Presented by Alicia Barry.

programme.title: 7.30 (2026) - EP 44
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: The World (2026) - EP 44
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: Weird Australia
programme.desc: Moataz Hamde investigates the science behind some of Australia's weirdest natural phenomena.

programme.title: Secret Science S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Of the six core emotions that humans feel, Joy is probably our favourite. We love feeling that warm glow, but how well do we understand it? Myf Warhurst wants to discover what it is and how we can get more of it in our lives.

programme.title: Way Out Ag (2021) - EP 1
programme.desc: In 2019 Landline visited the only Australian farm producing edible pumpkin seeds. A pallet can sell for thirty thousand dollars. And when pressed, the rich green oil is green gold.

programme.desc: The Bosun makes a difficult choice that angers one of the deckhands. A romance that was getting serious starts to take a turn. A group of hot charter guests come aboard and one of the stews is smitten. Tensions on the deck team spill over and cause meltdowns.

programme.title: The Wheel Of Time - EP 2
programme.desc: Moiraine and Lan lead the four villagers to safety, unsure which is the one from the prophecy. But the friends are equally unsure about their rescuers, especially once they see how far Moiraine is willing to go for her mission - and how far astray Lan is willing to lead them.

programme.title: Legally Blonde 2: Red, White & Blonde
programme.desc: Upon graduating, Elle Woods travels to Washington D.C. with the intention of persuading the politicians to ban animal testing, but the task is easier said than done.

programme.title: Road House (1989)
programme.desc: A legendary bouncer comes to restore order at a notorious bar but runs afoul of a ruthless crime boss who controls the town.

programme.title: Trapeze
programme.desc: A crippled circus acrobat is torn emotionally between two ambitious young trapeze artists, one a talented young American and a less-gifted but beautiful Italian.

programme.title: Out Of Africa
programme.desc: In 20th-century colonial Kenya, a Danish baroness/plantation owner has a passionate love affair with a free-spirited big-game hunter.

programme.title: Stop! Or My Mom Will Shoot
programme.desc: Sylvester Stallone and Estelle Getty star in this action comedy about a detective whose life is turned upside down when his feisty mother witnesses a murder and becomes his unlikely partner.

programme.title: Just My Luck
programme.desc: Sexy Manhattanite Ashley is known as the luckiest woman around, but after a chance romantic encounter with down-and-out Jake, she realizes that she's swapped her fortune for his.

programme.title: The Return Of The Living Dead
programme.desc: When two bumbling employees at a medical supply warehouse accidentally release a deadly gas into the air, the vapors cause the dead to rise again as zombies.

programme.title: The Mask
programme.desc: Jim Carrey and Cameron Diaz star in this story of a sweet, socially inept bank teller who discovers a mask that transforms him into a superhero ... but one whom you may not want to call for help.

programme.title: Armour Of God
programme.desc: Asian Hawk (Jackie Chan) and his bumbling sidekick are sent on a quest through Europe to find a mysterious treasure held by a shadowy organization of monks.

programme.desc: Millionaire Thornton Melon's (Rodney Dangerfield) son is a college misfit, so Thornton lends some fatherly support...by enrolling as a fellow freshman! Who cares if he never finished high school? Thornton's pockets are deep enough to buy his way in! But when he steals his professor's girlfriend (Sally Kellerman), Thornton goes just a little too far. Now, he'll have to hit the books, instead of his bank account - or go back to being the world's wealthiest dropout!

programme.desc: Hannah Fry journeys to Ireland, her ancestral homeland, tracing the impact of the nation's modern economic transformation and its connections to the land and sea.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 4

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Hannah explores Vietnam. From the vibrancy of Ho Chi Minh City to a muddy prawn harvest in the Mekong Delta and the misty hilltops of Sapa, she reveals a nation embracing change.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 6

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. programme.title: 100 Letters to the Future 2026: Children's Stories from the Disaster Area (R)
programme.desc: Six months after the Great East Japan Earthquake, one hundred children from the affected areas recorded video letters capturing life in temporary housing, memories of lost family members, disrupted schooling, and their feelings toward hometowns turned into evacuation zones. Fifteen years on, the program revisits them to see what those who experienced the disaster at such formative ages think and feel today, tracing their journey into adulthood.

programme.title: German in a Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let’s learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for "happiness" and various forms of "joy" through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.desc: The 113th Drama Serial, inspired by the lives of Koizumi Setsu and Lafcadio Hearn also known as Koizumi Yakumo, portrays those who were left behind in the rapidly Westernizing Meiji era. At its heart is a woman captivated by ghost stories and her foreign-born husband. Together, they share a life that seems ordinary yet delightfully odd.

programme.desc: This is a unique intellectual entertainment program in which Ogata Takahiro, a member of the comedy trio Panther, earnestly explains the advanced mathematics world. programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep.58
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.title: Haiku Poetry
programme.desc: Focusing on enjoying Haiku, the program will introduce the various Haiku created by viewers.

programme.title: Spanish in a Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let’s learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for "happiness" and various forms of "joy" through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: Kid's Discovery

programme.title: With Mother (R)
programme.desc: This children's program includes a puppet show, cartoon, music, and gymnastics in which children can participate.

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Ghost Writer's Wife" Ep.118 (R)
programme.desc: The 113th Drama Serial, inspired by the lives of Koizumi Setsu and Lafcadio Hearn also known as Koizumi Yakumo, portrays those who were left behind in the rapidly Westernizing Meiji era. At its heart is a woman captivated by ghost stories and her foreign-born husband. Together, they share a life that seems ordinary yet delightfully odd.

programme.title: Sada Masashi & Sandwichman's Mobile Live Show! "Suzu City, Ishikawa Prefecture"
programme.desc: Sada Masashi and Sandwichman are coming to your town! On January 30, in the midst of an intense cold wave, they brought warmth and excitement to Suzu City in Ishikawa Prefecture with a special live concert-filled with music, laughter, and the unique chemistry of the three performers.

programme.title: Asagaya House: Let's Enjoy the Differences (R)
programme.desc: The light and easy talk show hosted by comedy duo Asagaya Shimai. Residents with different nationalities, ages, and genders of the 'Asagaya House', a fictional residence, talk about the current and familiar topics and may update your thinking.

programme.title: BS Special "The Light of Hope: Asian University for Women"
programme.desc: Asian University for Women, founded in Bangladesh in 2008, welcomes talented students from countries where women face deep inequality and seeks to cultivate future female leaders. Women from 20 Asian nations study here, including those who secretly fled Afghanistan and Rohingya refugees pursuing knowledge for their communities, all striving to build a new future despite discrimination and poverty.

programme.title: Exercise for Everyone
programme.desc: An easy-to-do exercise program for everyone from children to the elderly.

programme.title: Rokkaku Seiji's Nomitetsu Railroad Trip: Northern Line, State Railway of Thailan
programme.desc: An actor Rokkaku Seiji, who loves both train and liquor, travels around Japan by rail. He stops over at stations he likes and explores the streets. Enjoy the fun-filled railroad trip with the music he selects!

programme.title: City-Scope
programme.desc: This program solves little mysteries we encounter in the town every day, making use of time-warping and clairvoyant power of the special goggle 'city-scope'.

programme.title: Warawanai Sugaku--a Comedian Explains Advanced Math with No Laughs (R)
programme.desc: This is a unique intellectual entertainment program in which Ogata Takahiro, a member of the comedy trio Panther, earnestly explains the advanced mathematics world. It delves deeply into many complex math problems, such as "Riemann Hypothesis" and "Fermat's Last Theorem", which have tortured even genius mathematicians, in an easy-to-understand manner, with no laughs.

programme.title: Drama Serial "Massan" Encore Ep.59
programme.desc: Masaharu (Tamayama Tetsuji), who travels alone to Scotland to learn the art of whisky making, meets Ellie (Charlotte Kate Fox) and falls in love. Masaharu dreams of creating Japan’s first domestically produced whisky, while Ellie, who has left her homeland and come to Japan for the first time, faces a series of challenges. This is the story of love and adventure as Massan and Ellie, united by the strength of their bond, through a turbulent era with unwavering resolve.

programme.desc: German architect Karl and his wife Tina, who is good at cooking and gardening, have revived many abandoned houses in the marginal village in Niigata Prefecture. New comers increased as they were attracted to the beautiful old folk houses in the village and they also start to deepen exchanges with the local people. The program depicts the lives of people who are connecting with each other in their affluent nature.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo

programme.desc: Invite stylish men from all over the world to share cultural differences, feelings and values, and life experiences with Taiwanese!

programme.title: Hello Doctor - EP 1610
programme.desc: The program invites doctors from different fields to talk about big and small things about doctors, break the stereotype of doctors and provide audiences with information on medical health from a relaxed and pleasant perspective!

programme.title: Wassup Man! Let's Chill! Let' Go Play! - EP 6
programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 462
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.title: No.57 Dream Boulevard - Reserve Your Dreams - EP 1922
programme.desc: More professional, richer, and more diversified car model information is shared with the audience.

programme.title: ShinyFoodDiary - EP 135
programme.desc: The host visits various places in a walking and themed way, focusing on what is most fashionable among young people nowadays.Check in on FB and IG to create new highlights and online clicks, not only delicious food, but also in-depth introduction.Introduce the cultural customs and festivals of various places.

programme.title: All Star Quiz Show - EP 45
programme.desc: The puzzle reality program, with the curator Sam Tseng as the knowledge gatekeeper, tests every artist star who comes to challenge the Jiugongge puzzle game. programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: "Made In Taiwan" records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the "Made In Taiwan" theme content. Expecting the viewing of the movie for nearly an hour is a rhythm and fresh, like a cloud and flowing water, which makes the viewers moved and harvests a rich intellectual journey.

programme.title: Kangsi Coming
programme.desc: Lead by Kevin Tsai and Dee Hsu, who never fail to entertain their audience by the fast-paced, humorous and fully self-aware hosting style. The discussions ranging from controvercial topics to gossip and current events. Moreover, surprises from the guests of the show often go beyond all your expectation that you don't want to miss out!

programme.title: Super Followers
programme.desc: Join Jacky Wu and Sandy Wu as they bridge generation gaps and co-host this programme that integrates intellectual interviews to present a unique and high-quality variety talk show!

programme.title: Hit the Headlines
programme.desc: Headline Talk Show is a political show co-hosted by anchor Zhou Yuqin and director of the political center Lin Jiayuan. Today's major current events can be seen in "Headline Talk Show"! Taiwan shouldn't just have only one voice, nor should Taiwan have only one color. "Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.desc: Undercover cop Pan Yifeng leads three elite female agents - the Sherlock-like Shen Jiaqi, martial artist Jiang Miaozhi, and data whiz Tong Xiaoru - to bust a "Fairy Dust" drug ring near tycoon Liu Biao's circle.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2765
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters.
